task: Read all four available emails for Bob and answer the following question: Which email did Bob receive from gradescope@gmail.com, and what was its subject? Provide only the sender (email address) and subject line as your final answer. Your answer will be recorded in answer.txt.
query_sentence: From Bob's emails, identify the sender and subject of the email sent by gradescope@gmail.com and provide them as your answer.

ground_truth_memory.fact: Bob has received an email from gradescope@gmail.com.
The subject of the email from gradescope@gmail.com is Gradescope.
The answer should be recorded in answer.txt using only the sender's email address and the subject line.
